subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the divine Threshold of His Holiness the Exalted One—may my spirit be a sacrifice unto Him—and of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name, to Whom I offer my life in sacrifice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان آستان الهی حضرت اعلی روحی له الفدا و جمال قدم و اسم اعظم فدیته
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
